title: stoma #4750
definition:
1) the mouth, as part of the body: of man, of animals, of fish, etc.
    1a) since thoughts of a man's soul find verbal utterance by his
        mouth, the "heart" or "soul" and the mouth are distinguished
 2) the edge of a sword
